### RECENT DECISIONS

Cycle 17: Descent begins — I fade the climax composite so the room can contract, and ease the palette toward cooler moonlight while the older anchors return to their earlier weight.
  - fadeElement({"element_id":"group_0013"})
  - paletteShift({"target":{"hue":12,"saturation":0.85},"duration_ms":3500})

Cycle 18: The third tahwil arrives quiet and dark — paradoxical elevation through withdrawal. I shift the background to deep slate and place the silhouette at the window as the right half-canvas anchor, fading the warmer climax composite.
  - setBackground({"css_background":"radial-gradient(ellipse at 65% 40%, rgba(74,102,112,0.32), rgba(20,22,28,0.98) 75%)"})
  - addImage({"query":"back of a person silhouette at a window at night, soft moonlight","position":"right half","motion":{"preset":"breathe","feature":"hijaz_intensity","intensity":0.6},"reactivity":[{"property":)
  - paletteShift({"target":{"hue":18,"saturation":0.78},"duration_ms":3500})

Cycle 19: A solitary figure walking across a dusk plain enters as a medium inset on the left — the quiet pivot's other body, walking parallel to the bowed silhouette at the window.
  - addImage({"query":"solitary figure walking across a dark plain at dusk, silhouette against fading sky","position":"center-left, medium inset","motion":{"preset":"drift","intensity":0.6},"reactivity":[{"propert)

### FUTURE PREVIEW

Cycle 21 (t=110s): Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Phrase break. Quiet, sustained. Warm timbre. Very sparse articulation with space. Tonal center G with secondary emphasis on A. Mid-performance.
Cycle 22 (t=115s): Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Moderate intensity, sustained. Bright timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center G with secondary emphasis on E. Mid-performance.
Cycle 23 (t=120s): Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Phrase break. Quiet, sustained. Warm timbre. Sparse articulation with space. Tonal center G with secondary emphasis on A. Deep into the performance.

### COMPOSITION INTENT FOR THIS CYCLE

Active act: Quiet pivot — back at the window (Energy drops sharply. Third tahwil at 18 is paradoxically dark — back at a window at night, head bowed in shadow. Phrase break at 21 holds stillness; brief reanimation at 22 before settling.)
Cycle intent: Loose linen drifts (drift preset on existing element). Single feather settles via transformElement — slow rotation. No new images.
Energy hint: low

### TASK
